working_on.notes: Version 1.3.6 released. Fixed critical voice timeout, schedule boot race condition, and added Split-View actions.

pending_tasks.task: Test voice commands on real hardware (due to emulator coreaudio host permission issues)

recent_changes.description: Version 1.3.6: Split-View action mapping, Voice Assistant reliability (Error 12 fallback), Fix Schedule Boot race condition.

errors_encountered.error: SpeechRecognizer Error 12 (Language Not Supported) on emulator
errors_encountered.solution: Implemented auto-fallback from On-Device recognition to Standard (Network) recognition in VoiceOverlayManager.
Identified as macOS System Privacy setting - requires granting Mic permission to Terminal/Emulator.

errors_encountered.error: Schedule automation intents overwritten by autoSplitOnBoot during startup
errors_encountered.solution: Introduced 4s delay and Intent flag to skip redundant split-screen execution during boot.

decisions_made.decision: Fallback to Network speech on Error 12
decisions_made.reason: Ensures reliability in environments where offline language packs are not installed (like emulators).

decisions_made.decision: Add '+ Thêm Lịch trình mẫu' button
decisions_made.reason: Simplifies manual testing of complex schedule/automation flows.
Cleanly resolves boot race conditions without complex service-state monitoring.
